A plane crashed into the Hudson River, NYPD increased security amid Iran-related protests, and power was restored after an outage affecting Staten Island, while NYC faces ongoing issues with crime, homelessness, and public safety measures.

### Risks & Alerts

- Plane flying out of New York crashed into freezing Hudson River. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYPD boosts security as Iran-related protests unfold in New York City after Iran attack. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Power restored after outage impacts over 1,500 on Staten Island’s South Shore. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
